summary: Final UX Refinements Testing Complete - All 11 backend tests PASSED, all 9 frontend UI verification checks PASSED. All 8 areas of improvement verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: DirectorView.js: Clean implementation with MOMENTUM_CONFIG for improving/stable/declining states, proper trend delta display
RecruitingSignalsCard.js: Large centered numbers (text-4xl font-extrabold) with trend arrows and delta text
NeedsAttentionCard.js: 5 category groups with 3 contextual quick actions per row (Open Athlete + 2 context-specific)
CoachHealthCard.js: Activity signal shows 'No activity yet' or days since last activity, status badges working
ActivityFeed.js: Shows 6 most recent items with typed icons and 'Name — description' format using mdash separator
Backend mission_control.py: _compute_trends correctly calculates needAttentionDelta (5) and momentum state (declining, -28%)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data and program_snapshots
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final UX refinements fully verified. Key features: (1) Need Attention KPI shows '↑ +5 this week' trend indicator, (2) Program Momentum below KPIs shows 'Declining' state with 'Recruiting engagement -28% this week', (3) Recruiting Signals shows 18/26/116 as large centered numbers with trend arrows, (4) Needs Attention has 5 category groups with 3 quick actions per row, (5) Coach Health shows status badges (Activating), workload bars (High/Moderate/Light), activity signals, (6) Activity Feed shows 6 most recent items with typed icons and 'Name — description' format.

kpis.details: 25 Athletes, 5 Coaches, 12 Need Attention, 5 Events Ahead, 0 Unassigned

need_attention_trend.details: Shows '↑ +5 this week' with red color for increasing issues

program_momentum.details: Shows 'PROGRAM MOMENTUM - Declining - Recruiting engagement -28% this week' below KPI row

recruiting_signals.details: 3 large centered numbers (18, 26, 116) with labels and trend arrows (↑ +6, → same, ↑ +12)

needs_attention_categories.details: 5 category groups: Follow-Up Overdue, Ownership Gap, Momentum Drop, Blocker, Engagement Drop

needs_attention_quick_actions.details: 3 actions per row: Open Athlete + 2 contextual (Assign Coach, Send Reminder, Log Check-In, Request Document)

coach_health_activity_signal.details: Shows 'No activity yet' for each coach, status badges (Activating), workload indicators (High/Moderate/Light)

activity_feed_format.details: Shows 'PROGRAM ACTIVITY' with '6 most recent', items use 'Name — description' format with typed icons
